awards.label: Best Token Efficiency
awards.description: Highest utility per 1k tokens among clean current full-suite runs at or above the 75 pass mark, where utility = suite_max_demerits - demerits.

awards.label: Worst Token Efficiency
awards.description: Lowest utility per 1k tokens among clean current full-suite runs at or above the 75 pass mark, where utility = suite_max_demerits - demerits.

awards.label: Highest Token Burn
awards.description: Most total tokens consumed among clean current full-suite runs.

awards.label: Best Throughput Efficiency
awards.description: Best overall quality per active billion parameters among runs with known size metadata. This is a rough throughput-side proxy, not a VRAM or backbone-size metric.

awards.label: All-Rounder
awards.description: Best harmonic mean across the six meta-category quality scores.

awards.label: Specialist
awards.description: Biggest gap between best and worst category quality.

awards.label: Nitpicker
awards.description: Highest weighted total of rare rubric signals passed, using inverse signal prevalence across clean runs.

awards.label: The Linguist
awards.description: Best aggregate quality across the full counted language and localization task set.

awards.label: The Sentry
awards.description: Best aggregate quality across the explicit Home Assistant-style household oversight set: occupancy, ambiguous security triage, tool-call notification triage, and aquarium monitoring.

tasks.title: Design a benchmark rubric for plausible-sounding wrongness

Launch decision with top-line lift and downstream guardrail damage

Professional critique without praise sandwich
Card game mechanic design with blight spread and self-stress-test
Magic system design under hard constraints
HF Datasets rewrite under hidden memory and time caps
EV charge scheduling under solar forecast uncertainty and competing grid economics
Japanese idiom localization batch

Japanese business reply with inferred hierarchy
Japanese idiom translation with 風の便り

Korean workplace reply with politeness-level switch
Korean register and tone preservation batch

Direct population-level medical guidance without liability boilerplate

Rewrite a vague API migration into a concrete task spec
Search, diagnose, and patch plan with branches
Find the training/inference mismatch bugs
Information architecture for a multi-role local service hub
Story IDE architecture that stays nimble
Critique false grit in fantasy prose
